text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 145 

SPLMTL_PRVDR_ID 

LABEL: Annual Provider Record in Supplemental Identifier File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is one or more record(s) in the provider Identifiers supplemental file for 
this provider (linking from provider base to the provider Location and provider Identifier files via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY and the PRVDR_LCTN_ID). 

SHORT NAME:
